description.value:
Enigmatic scrolls with runes scribed in bloodred ink. Some claim the Parchments were preserved by the same cult that saved the Accounts of Eibon when the great ice sheet ground Hyperborea beneath it; others suggest they are a fragment of Eibon's work. Regardless, they form an elaborate genealogy of the Great Old Ones—gods or titans that predated Earth's creation. Details their origins in vast space or distant worlds, interactions with each other, and eventual arrival on Earth. Emphasis is given to the lineage of the toad-like Tsathoggua.

LanguageHyperborean
AuthorUnknown
DateAncient origin
Sanity Loss2D6
Cthulhu Mythos+3/+8 percentiles
Mythos Rating33
